news.title: Stock Futures to Trade as Iran Fires Missiles Toward Israel
news.summary: Stock futures are poised to begin trading later on Sunday after Friday’s selloff, and oil futures are likely to respond to new attacks as the Iran war marks its 100th day with no peace deal in sight.  The prospects for peace seemed more distant after Iran fired missiles toward Israel on Sunday, as The Wall Street Journal reported, after an earlier Israeli airstrike on Beirut targeted the Hezbollah militants backed by Tehran.  Iran had earlier threatened to hit Israel and American military bases in the Middle East because of Israeli airstrikes on the Lebanese capital, despite the U.S.-announcing a ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon last week, the Journal report said.
